subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which Mughal Emperor laid the foundation of Jaipur?
question_hi: जयपुर के निर्मितिवास कौन से मुगल सरकारी ने निर्मितिवास को लाया?
explanation_en: Jai Singh, a Rajput king, laid the foundation of Jaipur. He was the founder of the Amer Fort and the city of Jaipur.
explanation_hi: जय सिंग, राजपूती सरकारी, Jaipur के निर्मितिवास की सोप्यास के श्रेषु, एम फोट और Jaipur की सत्यास की सोप्यास समासा
D_explanation: Jai Singh, a Rajput king, laid the foundation of Jaipur. He was the founder of the Amer Fort and the city of Jaipur.,
